failure.message: AssertionError: Receipt request failed: 500 assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_e31_full_integration.py:152: in test_01_create_e31_bill_and_verify_receipt assert receipt_resp.status_code == 200, f"Receipt request failed: {receipt_resp.status_code}" E AssertionError: Receipt request failed: 500 E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
